Name: Avg CN0 Top 4 Per Epoch
Description: Average CN0 of the top 4 signals per epoch

Name: Max Time Between Epochs
Description: Maximum gap between consecutive measurement epochs

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GPS_L1)
Description: Average number of valid GPS L1 signals per epoch

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GPS_L5)
Description: Average number of valid GPS L5 signals per epoch

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GLO_G1)
Description: Average number of valid GLONASS G1 signals per epoch

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GAL_E1)
Description: Average number of valid Galileo E1 signals per epoch

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GAL_E5A)
Description: Average number of valid Galileo E5A signals per epoch

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GAL_E5B)
Description: Average number of valid Galileo E5B signals per epoch

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (BDS_B1I)
Description: Average number of valid BeiDou B1I signals per epoch

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (BDS_B2A)
Description: Average number of valid BeiDou B2A signals per epoch

Name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (BDS_B1C)
Description: Average number of valid BeiDou B1C signals per epoch

Name: Required Sig Types
Description: Each required signal type (GPS L1+L5, GAL E1+E5A+E5B, BDS B1I+B2A+B1C, GLO G1) must average >= 1 per epoch. PASS if missing_types list is empty.

Name: Measurement State Usable
Description: Percentage of raw measurements with STATE_TOW_DECODED or STATE_TOW_KNOWN set

Name: Duplicate Signals
Description: Number of duplicate (same SVid + frequency) signals in a single epoch

Name: Time Tag Large Jumps
Description: Number of gaps > 2000 ms between consecutive epochs

Name: Time Tag Jitter
Description: Standard deviation of inter-epoch time differences

Name: Time-sync Max Jitter
Description: Maximum deviation of hardware clock sync from nominal 1-second intervals

Name: Time-sync Jitter
Description: Standard deviation of hardware clock sync jitter across all epochs

Name: Delta ElapsedRealtimeNanos Range
Description: Range (max - min) of delta-ElapsedRealtimeNanos across epochs

Name: Delta ElapsedRealtimeNanos Std
Description: Standard deviation of delta-ElapsedRealtimeNanos across epochs

Name: Delta Clock Bias MPS Std
Description: Standard deviation of receiver clock bias drift (metres per second)

Name: LS-Freq PR Residuals Std
Description: Standard deviation of L1 pseudorange residuals from a least-squares clock-only fit

Name: Percent Valid ADR
Description: Percentage of measurements with ADR_STATE_VALID set (bit 0 of AccumulatedDeltaRangeState)

Name: Percent Usable ADR
Description: Percentage of measurements with ADR valid and not reset or cycle-slipped

Name: ADR Variability
Description: Median absolute deviation of ADR residuals across satellites within an epoch

Name: Median (PRR - Delta(ADR))
Description: Median of the difference between pseudorange rate and delta-ADR (should be ~0)

Name: Std (PRR - Delta(ADR))
Description: Standard deviation of (PRR - delta-ADR); measures consistency between Doppler and phase

Name: L1freq (Delta(PR) - Delta(ADR))
Description: Median absolute deviation of L1 delta-pseudorange minus delta-ADR across epochs

Name: L5freq (Delta(PR) - Delta(ADR))
Description: Median absolute deviation of L5 delta-pseudorange minus delta-ADR across epochs

Name: L1-Freq PR Residuals Std
Description: Standard deviation of L1 pseudorange residuals after clock estimation (center 94% of data)

Name: L5-Freq PR Residuals Std
Description: Standard deviation of L5 pseudorange residuals after clock estimation (center 94% of data)

Name: L1-Freq Median Normalized PR Residual RMS
Description: RMS of L1 PR residuals normalized by the reported pseudorange uncertainty; should be ~1.0 if uncertainties are well-calibrated

Name: L5-Freq Median Normalized PR Residual RMS
Description: RMS of L5 PR residuals normalized by the reported pseudorange uncertainty

Name: Percent PR Residuals Outliers
Description: Percentage of L1 pseudorange residuals exceeding 3-sigma of the per-epoch residual distribution

Name: Num Epochs for ADR Residual Analysis
Description: Minimum number of epochs with enough valid ADR to compute ADR residuals

Name: ADR Residuals Std
Description: Standard deviation of carrier-phase (ADR) residuals after clock and geometry removal (reference: 0.015 m at L1 = ~0.079 cycles)

Name: Median Normalized ADR Residual RMS
Description: RMS of ADR residuals normalized by the reported ADR uncertainty

Name: Percent Epochs with High ADR Residuals
Description: Percentage of epochs where the ADR residual RMS exceeds 3x the median

Name: PRR Residuals Std
Description: Standard deviation of pseudorange-rate (Doppler) residuals after velocity estimation (center 94% of data)

Name: Percent Epochs with High PRR Residuals
Description: Percentage of epochs where PRR residual RMS exceeds 3x the median

Name: Median Normalized PRR Residual RMS
Description: RMS of PRR residuals normalized by the reported PRR uncertainty; 1.0 = perfectly calibrated
